query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: Two people sit on a pinstriped sofa in a warmly lit indoor space. The individual on the right raises a clear glass bottle toward their face, while the person on the left leans near a small blue-striped illuminated object. A bright lamp glows in the upper left corner, and elongated trails of warm light stretch across the lower portion of the frame. Foliage is visible in the background on the right side.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavy motion blur softens the entire scene, turning two individuals seated on a pinstriped sofa into ghostly, dreamlike figures. The person on the right raises a clear glass bottle toward their face while the person on the left leans near a blue-striped illuminated object, both subjects smeared by camera movement during a long exposure. A bright wall lamp and surrounding amber light sources streak into sweeping, elongated ribbons of light that arc across the foreground and background, creating a dynamic, hazy atmosphere where solid forms dissolve into pure motion and glow.
